heroHeadline: Day 41: Iran Claims Strategic Victory While Ceasefire Strains Under Israeli Lebanon Campaign
heroSubtitle: WSJ analysis: Tehran frames conflict outcome as a win — deterrence re-established, nuclear program intact — despite severe military losses. Separately, Israeli strikes in Lebanon kill 254, testing the US-Iran ceasefire's durability.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-09. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com, Wall Street Journal.
